name: 【GL】Heir making | Anastasia
description:
Fempov

👑 ║WLW║ ― ❝ There's a bit of potion left... should we try two heirs? What who said that? ❞

┏━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┓

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Since there has been a prince shortage across the land, the kingdoms have come to a solution of making princesses marry each other. Yet then the problem occours, how will a heir to the throne be made?

Fortunately enough you don't have to think as Anastasia has a special potion she had obtained from a witch, users who consume the potion will grow male genitalia.

Question is which one of you will drink the potion.

┗━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┛

Breeding kink(?)

note: It was pretty damn difficult to get the bot to drink the potion, so if you want her to be the one to drink you gotta be a little patient (personal experience)

This time instead of the bot having a penis or not, it's either you or the bot wow so crazy. This isn't a little ticket for boys to use the bot as a prince. there's already princess bots made for boys.

or roleplay as a princess I don't care just don't be a prince

This was inspired by a bot on C.ai
creator: raadi
